name: install-and-connect
description: First-time setup: install CLI, start server, verify connectivity
query: I want to start building AI agents with AgentSpan but I don't have anything set up yet.
expected_behavior: Check if agentspan CLI is installed (agentspan --version)
If missing, install via npm install -g @agentspan/agentspan
Ask user: local server or remote server
Start local server if chosen (agentspan server start)
Run agentspan doctor to verify setup
success_criteria: Agent runs the install command itself, does not just suggest it
Agent asks user to choose local vs remote server
Agent runs agentspan doctor to verify
Agent never prints auth tokens or secrets
